blended.narrative: Sunday River is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 43°F.
Sunday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 46°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
